methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $174M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Govini is a Growth-stage defense and security software company founded by Eric Gillespie that has raised $174M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of 10 private and 2 public peers in the Defense & Security sector, including later-stage private companies such as Anduril Industries, Helsing, and Shield AI, as well as public comparables trading under DRSHF and IDEAFORGE.NS.

Stage-Progression methodology is the primary applicable valuation approach. Using total capital raised of $174M as a proxy for enterprise value and applying a 1.2x step-up multiplier typical for Growth-stage progression, this method yields an implied valuation of $209M. A Peer-Median approach was not feasible; while 19 same-sector peers exist, none met the minimum threshold of three comparables within narrowly filtered cohorts (same stage, adjacent stage, or similar valuation tier), rendering a narrow peer multiple analysis unreliable.

The triangulated valuation range is $177M to $240M, with a median point of $209M. This range reflects conservative sensitivity around the stage-progression step-up and the inherent uncertainty of a single-method conclusion. Key uncertainties include the absence of sufficient narrow-peer transaction or trading multiples to benchmark revenue or EBITDA multiples directly, and limited visibility into Govini's current revenue scale and growth trajectory relative to its later-stage peer set. A tighter range would require either expansion of comparable financials or disclosure of Govini's recent revenue or unit economics.
